# PlayIQ

> PlayIQ creates STEM educational toys that inspire creativity and learning through hands-on magnetic building experiences.

## About PlayIQ

PlayIQ is an educational toy company specializing in magnetic building blocks for children ages 3+. Our flagship product is a 181-piece space-themed magnetic construction set designed to develop STEM skills, creativity, and fine motor abilities through screen-free play.

## Products

### PlayIQ 181-Piece Magnetic Building Blocks Set

A complete STEM educational toy kit featuring:
- 181 magnetic building pieces with galactic space prints
- Glow-in-the-dark alien and astronaut figures
- LED light-up characters for day-to-night play
- Double-sided magnetic board for stability
- Scene guidebook with 6 buildable designs
- Storage box included

**Key Features:**
- Age range: 3+ years (designed for 3-7 year olds)
- Safety: BPA-free, CE-certified, eco-friendly materials
- Compatibility: Works with standard 2x2cm magnetic blocks
- Educational focus: STEM, 3D thinking, geometry, fine motor skills

**Purchase:** Available on Amazon at amazon.com/dp/B0F3LV725Z

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What age is this toy for?**
A: Designed for children ages 3 and up, with activities suitable for ages 3-7.

**Q: Are the blocks safe?**
A: Yes. Made with BPA-free, CE-certified materials with enclosed magnets and rounded edges.

**Q: Are they compatible with other magnetic blocks?**
A: Yes, fully compatible with other 2x2cm magnetic building blocks.

**Q: What STEM skills does it teach?**
A: Spatial reasoning, 3D thinking, geometry, problem-solving, and fine motor skills.

**Q: Can I build all scenes in the guidebook with this set?**
A: Yes, all 6 scenes can be built using only the included pieces.
